title: Opila
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Opila.png|thumb|right|150px|Opila]]
An '''opila''' was a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] occasionally used in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] construction. The crystal was [[Mining/Legends|mined]] from an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|field]] in the [[Fyrth system/Legends|Fyrth system]].

When set in a lightsaber's crystal chamber, opila generated an intense blade capable of cutting through most materials quickly.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Strongholds]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' {{C|[[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]] version}}
